---
title: "Posts"
title-block-style: none
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
---

::: {.home-hero}
Hi, I'm Alan and welcome to my blog. Here I'm hoping to write about machine learning, statistics, and whatever else interests me. I don't know how often I'll post, but I hope you learn something from reading what I've written.
:::
